arts.ttl: Tottenham announce Kevin Danso signing from Lens as shirt number, transfer details confirmed
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur complete the signing of Lens defender Kevin Danso on loan with an obligation to buy at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Official | Tottenham sign Lens’ Kevin Danso on loan
arts.sum: Tottenham have announced the signing of Lens centre-back Kevin Danso (26). The Spurs have successfully hijacked Wolves’ pursuit of the Austrian international centre-back. Rennes were also interested in acquiring Danso.…

arts.ttl: League One manager apologises for making 'stupid' Ange Postecoglou comment - and admits he's 'deeply embarrassed' for disrespectful swipe at Tottenham boss
arts.sum: Leyton Orient manager Richie Wellens has apologised for making a 'stupid comment' about Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou after his side's 1-0 defeat against Stockport on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Tottenham beat Wolves to sign Lens defender Danso
arts.sum: Austria international Kevin Danso looked set to join Wolves but has chosen to move to Tottenham instead.

arts.ttl: Report: What initially put Spurs off signing Kevin Danso & the reason why Daniel Levy changed his mind so late

arts.ttl: Spurs near €25m centre-back signing with medical booked
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are closing in on the signing of Kevin Danso from Lens with a medical booked for the defender. Spurs have agreed a package worth €25m (£20.9m) for the Austria international, who will provided much needed cover at centre-back in the absences of Cristian Romero and Radu Dragusin. arts.ttl: “Agreement in place” – Fabrizio Romano issues exciting Tottenham transfer update
arts.sum: Tottenham are set to complete their first signing of the winter transfer window. Ange Postecoglou’s side have been unlucky with injuries this season and that has translated into their poor results this season.
